name: drift-detection scan exits zero and writes an empty report when no `rubric: ignore` and no `--no-verify` bypasses are found
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'function f() { return 1; }\n' > src/clean.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/drift-detection/scan.sh" --paths src --out report.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ ! -s report.jsonl ] && echo clean 1>&2
